title: Artificial Flowers, 2 Pack Fake Peony Silk Light Blue Hydrangea Bouquet Decor Plastic Carnations Daisy Realistic Flower Arrangements Wedding Decoration Table Centerpieces, for Home Office Party Decor
features: The silk peony flowers have 2 packs in package, each pack has 7 stems with silk soft hydrangea, peonies, carnations, several flower bubbles, plastic grass and bushy leaves that will be full-looking after simple arrangement.

Artificial flowers fit for wedding bridal bouquets and flowers decor, centerpieces, home indoor and garden outdoor decoration, office, party, anniversary, cemetery, Valentine's Day，Christmas and Happy New Year's Day decorations.

Fake flowers create romantic beauty that enables you to enjoy poetic homelife in your kitchen, windowsill, living room, dining table, bedroom, front porch, garden, veranda, balcony with these silk flowers.

Artificial flowers may be squeezed and deformed in transit, but it will be recover with slight adjustment after displaying it. You can also use boiled water to smoke deformed flowers, use the hair dryer with cold wind to dry it.
Plastic flowers are uv resistant and vivid realistic, can be put anywhere the hot/cold weather kills much fresh flowers and always vibrant and alive with you.
description: Product Description LAWOHO’s artificial silk flowers have the appearance of natural flowers and provide a realistic look for the decoration of your home, office or special events. Made of high-quality fabric and plastic, washable and durable. Each flower head in the 2 bunches can replace the actual flower and look like an actual flower. Material: Fabric, Plastic Dimensions: Each flower head is approximately 1.5-3.5 inches across. Color: Blue Quantity: 2 Bundles Realistic and Unfading Lifelike, never fade, and always keep fresh and beautiful. These artificial flowers can create a romantic atmosphere and are very suitable as bridal bouquets. Perfect Decorations Well made and vibrantly colored, looks real-like. Artificial flowers are suitable for wedding, home or venue decoration. You can use it to decorate offices, living rooms, table centerpieces, indoors and outdoors wherever you want to decorate. Ideal flower decoration for anniversary, Valentine's Day, Christmas, New Year, etc. Easy to Take Care Never fade or fall. You don't need to water or trim. If you like flowers but don't have much time to take care of, then our artificial flowers will be a good choice for you. Tips: The flowers may become slightly compressed during transportation. Simply straighten the petals to easily restore their correct shape. Because the flower is made of plastic, it may have some smell. If you mind, please put artificial flowers in a ventilated place for 1-2 days.
